creator: empty.japan
caption:
When I was in Shiga Prefecture, working on my Secrets of Kansai guide, I stopped by a small local shop and chatted with the owner about what I was doing. What happened next completely surprised me. He asked me to wait, dashed outside, and ran to nearby restaurants and shops. Before I knew it, several people gathered around, each handing me their business cards and excitedly sharing their stories.

It hit me how much they care about what they do. I really hope more people get to see and feel that when they visit spots like this ❤️
